question: Is the central character a British Shorthair cat with a solid blue-gray coat, consistent with the subject reference?
Does the cat character retain key facial features of the reference, specifically a round face shape and copper/orange eyes?
Is the cat character depicted in a standing pose, distinct from the sitting pose in the reference image?
Is the cat positioned in front of the castle gate and scaled like a game protagonist (significantly larger than realistic scale relative to the building)?
Does the background architecture strictly follow the castle edge map, featuring a tall central tower flanked by two cylindrical side turrets?
Are the bridge/causeway and the central arched gate visible and aligned with the perspective of the structure reference?
Are the crenellations (battlements) on the castle walls and towers preserved in the pixel representation?
Is the entire image rendered in a pixel art style with visible, discrete pixel blocks and no smooth gradients?
Does the color palette match the vibrant, saturated retro game aesthetic of the style reference?
Are the outlines and edges crisp and grid-aligned (aliased), avoiding blurry or anti-aliased transitions?
Does the image include game interface elements (e.g., HUD, life bars, or text boxes) consistent with the provided style reference?
Is the pixel grid size consistent across the entire image, ensuring the character and background appear to belong to the same resolution?
Is the image free from significant distortions, such as floating geometry, malformed limbs, or unrecognizable artifacts?
